productDisplayName: Reebok Men's ZigSonic Grey & Yellow Shoe
description: Reebok ZigSonic trainer with a ventilated mesh upper with synthetic overlays and synthetic lining with cutouts for style, support and breathabilityMildly padded tongue with branding and perforations for greater breathability and central lace-upsStableFit technology in the heel to provide excellent rear-foot fit and stabilityCushioned collar for extra comfort with Play Dry lining on the insole for moisture managementFull-length Phylon midsole for lightweight cushioningZigTech's unique multi-surface outsole with forefoot flex grooves and carbon-rubber heel strike designed to optimize energy return, lateral support, stability and optimal traction reducing wear and tear of your shins by up to 20%
